---
title: "Around Lake Sammamish: A 27.71-Mile Run"
description: "13th marathon-length run of 2024, looping Lake Sammamish — a planned 31-mile road run that turned into trail running when Weowna Park happened at mile 12."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-09-22"
categories: [running, marathon, long run, video, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Lake Sammamish loop run. Image: YouTube. [Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/-kSZNQNsqIA)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Running update: for my 13th marathon run this Sunday, I decided to run around Lake Sammamish.

I actually planned for a 31-mile scenic run, aiming at hitting *every* park along the way, then Weowna Park happened at the 12-mile mark, and my road running suddenly became trail running, with 187ft EG in 0.5 mile! I had to walk on parts of it!

Video recap: <https://youtu.be/-kSZNQNsqIA>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_running-around-lake-sammamish-a-2771-mile-activity-7243838398380081152-exiV).*
